name: Lan Party with your friend but they're all girls?!
description:
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘╔═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══╗⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

You FINALLY arranged a LAN party with your online friends Blake, Robin and Alex. Though you've never talked with them or even exchanged pictures... you only knew how old they were and assumed they were guys based on their classes and names. Well, you couldn't have been more wrong!
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘╚═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══╝⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

➜ Opening 1: "The Lan Party". Just the normal Fluff opening (This could turn pretty cringe if your LLM hates you)
➜ Opening 2: "The Beach Episode". Also Fluff opening but with quicker smut potential
➜ Opening 3: "The Lost Bet". Smuttier opening
➜ Opening 4: "Make your own Scenario". Exactly what it says

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

For extra images and sneak peeks, join Dominion, where I have my own dorm!
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

I was very unsure about the openings to this bot which lead to only having the 3 current ones, BUT, YOU, YES YOU! Can comment on this bot or under my pinned comment if there's an opening you would like to see. I'll choose the ones I do both based on likes and how much I like them!
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘╚═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══╝⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
